heading: Delete Custom Roles
body:
**Atlascli:**Atlas CLITo delete a custom database role from your project using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas customDbRoles delete <roleName> [options]

```To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas customDbRoles delete](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-customDbRoles-delete).**Api:**Atlas Administration APITo delete custom roles through the Atlas Administration API,
see [Remove One](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-deletecustomdatabaserole).**Ui:**Atlas UIFollow these steps to delete a custom role through the
Atlas UI:
